prompt: Dramatic industrial workshop photograph: an angle grinder fitted with a segmented diamond cutting disc slicing into a thick slab of grey speckled granite at right, a fine spray of water and stone dust bursting from the cut toward the left, a gloved worker hand gripping the tool at the right edge.
